description_long: This is a modern multi-unit residential house complex situated on a rectangular plot with a combination of green landscaping and paved surfaces. The structure features a series of connected, boxy volumes with flat roofs, large windows, and a clean, geometric design. The exterior is primarily white and gray, with some brown accents suggesting wood or composite paneling. The complex is bordered by a wide black road or driveway, and the landscaping includes terraced green areas with a stepped pattern. The front façade faces a main access road and includes multiple entryways, likely serving individual units. The overall design emphasizes minimalism, functionality, and integration with the surrounding terrain.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, large windows, and geometric landscaping, bordered by a wide road. The exterior is white, gray, and brown, with terraced green areas and multiple entryways.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main façade with multiple entryways, flat roofs, and the terraced green landscaping leading up to the house.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the depth of the complex, the stepped landscaping, and the alignment of the units along the road.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the house complex, with less visible entry detail and more focus on the flat roof structure and rear landscaping.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the length of the complex, the terraced green area, and the connection to the main road.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Multiple main entryways with flat overhangs, steps, and minimalistic doors, integrated into the geometric façade
